title: Ubiquiti UACC-Retrofit-PSU-12V, Power and backup supply for Retrofit Hub
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UACC-Retrofit-PSU-12V is a 12V DC power supply designed for use with the UA-Retrofit-Hub-2 . It supports connection of a lead-acid (SLA) battery , which serves as a backup power source during power outages while also providing automatic battery charging Device Cables for connecting the battery and hub Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Power Power type Mains power (230V), Battery Output Voltage [V] 12 Output Current [A] 5 Max. power consumption [W] 80 Efficiency [%] 85
